subject: [PATCH v6 2/2] mm: use mapping_max_folio_order() for force_thp_readahead order

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the cap of 2MB for large folio readahead requests and suggested exploring alternative approaches to reduce TLB pressure.
sentiment_signals: Needs further discussion on TLB pressure

2026-05-28.patch_summary: This patch modifies the force_thp_readahead path in do_sync_mmap_readahead() to use mapping_max_folio_order() when HPAGE_PMD_ORDER exceeds MAX_PAGECACHE_ORDER. It introduces a cap of 2MB for large folio readahead requests, which is chosen based on the PMD size and contiguous-PTE block size on various architectures.
